critical.mandate: Rollback must be executable without additional approvals during incident
Data rollback strategy must be explicitly defined

step.title: Trigger Criteria
step.action: Define when to rollback: error rate threshold, latency spike, critical bug
Specify automated vs manual rollback triggers
Define who has authority to initiate rollback

step.title: Rollback Procedure
step.action: Define rollback mechanism: redeploy previous version, traffic shift, feature flag

step.title: Data Rollback
step.action: Specify data fix procedures for any data written by new version
Identify data that cannot be rolled back and mitigation plan

step.title: Communication
step.action: Define who to notify during rollback: engineering, stakeholders, users
Specify incident response process and escalation path
Prepare status page and communication templates

step.title: Generate Plan
step.template-output: Generate rollback plan with: trigger criteria, step-by-step procedure, data rollback strategy, communication plan, and post-rollback verification steps.
